input.message: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.

why_it_matters: Clear refund and duplicate-charge language should route to billing.

input.message: I cannot log in because my account says it is locked after too many attempts.

why_it_matters: Account lockout should not be treated as a technical bug.

input.message: I cannot access my account and I also want a refund if this is not fixed today.

why_it_matters: Mixed account-access and refund intent should use the conservative fallback.
